verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "`lsof -i :3000` — it lists the process holding the port"; A has a short preface "On macOS:" before the same command.

verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the command and PID/kill variant with less surrounding text.
